subcodes.first_line: Adorn thou the vesture of the Mother of Utterance, revealed from the All-Merciful, with this most exalted Word: "Be thou Mine, that I may be thine." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: دیباج ام البیان من لدی الرحمن به این کلمه علیا مزین  کن لی لاکون لک
subcodes.subjects: @praise and encouragement, @love and unity, @call to action, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
